title: schoepfia californica
intro: Schoepfia californica, also known as California tree of heaven, is a plant species native to the southwestern region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. It has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Traditional herbal preparations of Schoepfia californica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
